description: Celebrate and enhance your femininity with these comfortable sandals from catwalk. With its sober hue and sleek design, this pair is perfect for everyday casual wear.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed criss-cross straps for the forefoot for enhanced comfort and durabilityLeather ankle loop with velcro closureSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heel for enhanced grip and tractionHerringbone lugs Sandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
